prompts.text: first coffee is suspect is frame 3 - you know your fps your config your expected perf
reply: :huh<n>youre right — i do track that stuff
frame 3 of what tho, you testing my context window or you got a specific sequence in mind
and yeah first coffee hits weird — body hasnt calibrated yet, could be rocket fuel could be placebo
you mapping your own performance metrics or just vibing with the uncertainty
either way respect the self awareness :cool_with_sunglasses
